title: lucuma bifera
intro: Lucuma bifera, also known as the Peruvian cherry or lucuma tree, is a species of flowering plant in the family Sapindaceae. The plant's medicinal properties include its use in treating digestive issues and fever, with its bark and roots containing tannins, alkaloids, and other compounds with potential health benefits. The health benefits of Lucuma bifera are said to include antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties, which may help protect against cell damage and chronic diseases. Herbal preparations of Lucuma bifera include teas, infusions, and extracts, which are traditionally used in folk medicine in Peru and other parts of South America.
